translations.fr: Il me manque encore un ingrédient.
translations.ru: Мне всё ещё не хватает одного ингредиента.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn còn thiếu một nguyên liệu.
translations.nl: Ik heb nog één ingrediënt nodig.
translations.hi: मुझे अभी एक सामग्री और चाहिए।
translations.ja: まだ材料がひとつ足りない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses the action of needing.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates an additional or remaining need.
Indefinite determiner, feminine accusative singular; marks an indefinite direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.

sentences.target: Diese Zutat habe ich leider nicht da.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzə ˈt͡suːtaːt ˈhaːbə ɪç ˈlaɪ̯dɐ nɪçt daː/

translations.de: Diese Zutat habe ich leider nicht da.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzə ˈt͡suːtaːt ˈhaːbə ɪç ˈlaɪ̯dɐ nɪçt daː/
translations.en: I don't have this ingredient, unfortunately.
translations.es: Por desgracia, no tengo este ingrediente.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, je n'ai pas cet ingrédient.
translations.ru: К сожалению, у меня нет этого ингредиента.
translations.he: לצערי אין לי את המרכיב הזה.
translations.vi: Tiếc là tôi không có nguyên liệu này.
translations.nl: Helaas heb ik dit ingrediënt niet.
translations.uk: На жаль, у мене немає цього інгредієнта.
translations.hu: Sajnos nincs meg ez a hozzávaló.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्य से मेरे पास यह सामग्री नहीं है।
translations.el: Δυστυχώς δεν έχω αυτό το υλικό.
translations.nb: Dessverre har jeg ikke denne ingrediensen.
translations.id: Sayangnya saya tidak punya bahan ini.
translations.sv: Tyvärr har jag inte den här ingrediensen.
translations.ro: Din păcate, nu am acest ingredient.
translations.da: Desværre har jeg ikke denne ingrediens.
translations.fi: Valitettavasti minulla ei ole tätä ainesosaa.
translations.ja: 残念ながらこの材料はありません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine accusative singular; modifies the fronted object 'Zutat'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object moved to the clause-initial position.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses possession/availability.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'habe'.
Sentence adverb; conveys the speaker's attitude (regret).
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate to negate possession/availability.
Locative adverb used idiomatically with 'haben' to mean ‘on hand/available’.

sentences.target: Die Zutat muss ganz frisch sein.

translations.de: Die Zutat muss ganz frisch sein.
translations.en: The ingredient must be very fresh.
translations.es: El ingrediente tiene que estar muy fresco.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个食材必须非常新鲜。
translations.yue: 呢樣材料一定要好新鮮。
translations.pt: O ingrediente precisa estar bem fresco.
translations.ar: يجب أن يكون المكوّن طازجًا جدًا.
translations.nl: Het ingrediënt moet heel vers sein.
translations.hu: A hozzávalónak nagyon frissnek kell lennie.
translations.el: Το υλικό πρέπει να είναι πολύ φρέσκο.
translations.ro: Ingredientul trebuie să fie foarte proaspăt.
translations.ja: その材料はとても新鮮じゃないとだめです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; expresses necessity and selects an infinitive.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'frisch'.
Adjective used predicatively; complement to 'sein' describing the subject.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement selected by the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Für den Kuchen fehlt mir eine Zutat.
sentences.reading: /fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈkuːxən feːlt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈt͡suːtaːt/

translations.de: Für den Kuchen fehlt mir eine Zutat.
translations.ipa: /fyːɐ̯ deːn ˈkuːxən feːlt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈt͡suːtaːt/
translations.en: I'm missing an ingredient for the cake.
translations.es: Me falta un ingrediente para el pastel.
translations.fr: Il me manque un ingrédient pour le gâteau.
translations.it: Mi manca un ingrediente per la torta.
translations.yue: 我整蛋糕仲差一樣材料。
translations.ru: Для торта мне не хватает одного ингредиента.
translations.pt: Está faltando um ingrediente para o bolo.
translations.vi: Tôi còn thiếu một nguyên liệu cho chiếc bánh.
translations.nl: Voor de taart mis ik één ingrediënt.
translations.uk: Для торта мені бракує одного інгредієнта.
translations.hi: केक के लिए मेरे पास एक सामग्री नहीं है।
translations.pl: Brakuje mi jednego składnika do ciasta.
translations.el: Μου λείπει ένα υλικό για το κέικ.
translations.nb: Jeg mangler en ingrediens til kaka.
translations.id: Saya masih kurang satu bahan untuk kue.
translations.sv: Jag saknar en ingrediens till kakan.
translations.ro: Îmi lipsește un ingredient pentru tort.
translations.cs: Na dort mi chybí jedna surovina.
translations.da: Jeg mangler en ingrediens til kagen.
translations.ja: ケーキに必要な材料がひとつ足りない。
